response.overview: Ali Siddiq turns four unbelievable true stories, all starting on Mondays, into a 70-minute storytelling masterpiece. In his brand-new stand-up special MONDAYS, Ali Siddiq breaks down four stories — each one funnier, sharper, and more unbelievable than the last — all of which somehow started on a Monday.  Why does everything go wrong on Mondays?  From getting beat up by a professional boxer by accident, to childhood disasters, raccoon warfare and jail phone calls from Mexico... Ali proves once again why he’s called the greatest storyteller in the world.  MONDAYS delivers the classic Ali experience: true stories told with heart, humor, and the kind of detail that makes you swear you were right there with him. This special follows the massive success of Ali’s multi-part Domino Effect series (50+ million views), MY TWO SONS, RUGGED, and more — all fully available on his YouTube channel.
response.title: Ali Siddiq: Mondays
